positives: Continuous coverage maintained from 2020 through 2024 with no lapses
Claim frequency decreased in 2022 (4 claims) and 2023 (10 claims) compared to 2021 (15 claims)
concerns: Cancellation occurred in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group
Frequent carrier changes across the 5-year period (CNA, Nationwide, Zurich, Berkshire Hathaway Guard, Nationwide)
Loss ratios not reported in history
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 5-year claim counts: 2020: 6, 2021: 15, 2022: 4, 2023: 10, 2024: 13. Total premium over 5 years approximately 7,549,116.32. One cancellation noted in 2022 (Zurich).

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history reflects five consecutive annual policy terms (2020-2024) covering Workers Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Auto, and Commercial Property. Carriers included CNA Financial (2020), Nationwide Insurance (2021), Zurich Insurance Group (2022 - cancelled), Berkshire Hathaway Guard (2023), and Nationwide Insurance (2024). Claim counts by year: 2020 - 6; 2021 - 15; 2022 - 4; 2023 - 10; 2024 - 13. Loss ratios were not provided.
